title: Energy Bar Indicator
description: Turn your world into a RPG game adding the Stamina Bar
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) The Data Pack / Mod adds a **stamina system** for the player, which can be viewed via a **custom HUD**. When the player runs, stamina is progressively worn out. After 20 s of continuous running, stamina is depleted, causing fatigue effects (e.g., Slowness). ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d294cf1e574973ac9d09e264bf9c53b827c91b70.jpeg) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) **Stamina HUD**: A bar visible on the bottom of the screen or above the Hotbar. **Stamina exhaustion**: After 20 seconds of continuous running, debuffs are applied that slow down the player. **Stamina regeneration**: It regenerates automatically when walking or standing still. Configurability: Maximum run time, regeneration speed and duration of debuff can be customized. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png)
